{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230221085445B6DC107AEC2011EB"}"},"total":616},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612967417909642008","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，感觉意犹未尽，希望尽快加更，他不是那种纯系统那种很无聊的，他是主角会努力学习，进行超越，还有一套体系，看起来很有趣，不是纯打脸爽文的那一种，是那种有能力的真正意义上的有读书的文章！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772535673,"group_id":"7508781951524817982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无名的小作家，希望大家喜欢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3K50/WnNQ8rm781vRpOvOw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/81892f873a5b489dae118aa3ecf6c4d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793853&x-signature=8DIObE9xOYo7W9%2FJtdlv0bWfUJ4%3D","user_id":"86788081729","user_name":"鱼千干"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86788081729","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7508781951524817982","book_info":{"abstract":"高三学渣江野怎么也没想到，高考倒计时一百天时，自己竟然被网上相识的清北女神表白了。
“等你考来清北大学，我们就谈恋爱吧。”
嘶——
看着女神发来的自拍照，清丽绝美，白丝动人，少年的心跳开始极速攀升……
【检测到宿主强烈精神波动，系统激活中！】
【学神系统……激活成功！】
……
以清北大学这座全国最高学府为目标的学子中，天才人物如过江之鲫！
有全国各顶尖高校力压同辈，遥遥领先的当代圣子！
有天生智商超人，足以加入门萨俱乐部的仙身道体！
有上个高考时代的屈居银牌，选择涅槃重修的高四老怪！
天骄并起，群星闪烁！
此时，一位来自山村的少年，毅然加入这场全民登天之战，从零分学渣开始，在他前方，是浩浩荡荡一千六百万同辈考生的背影……
一场惊动全球的高考史诗就此拉开帷幕！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/62c0a5d6cf8cc956d17a60ec94f1184d","author":"秃头正太","author_id":"","book_id":"7508781951524817982","book_name":"开局零分学渣，你让我逆袭清北？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7508781980230615614","read_count":"60335","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"944214"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"441","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/955dff526281da82c798051818bc95c7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387668&x-signature=YxMd7ppKjml2vTcO%2BTxGZ98Jfm0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3136261762059118","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"88"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230221085445B6DC107AEC2011EB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2057,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5780,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3378},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7565392871380239129","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的很好，我看评论区主要说作者几个点：1中二，这个看个人喜好没什么好喷的，反正我挺喜欢的。2慢，啰嗦。我觉得本来就是写主角最后这一百天的成长历程包括心理成长，细致不是很正常吗，寥寥几笔带完100天纯爽反而差。3.关于高考制度，我只能说这是小说，有私设不是很正常，那人家有系统你怎么不代入，就代入人家的高考制度去了。4.主角人设变了，被压了。一个人从文盲到吸收了这么多知识见识了这么多东西，看到的世界不一样了他的性格肯定会变啊，知道的越多越知道自己的无知。关于被压，我觉得只是变沉稳了，不再那么冲动了，知道有更重要的事，反而能衬出他的意志力和他的压力之大吧。     之前我也想过女主这么久不出现难道真要到清北才出现吗，这还挺内啥的，不过后来作者穿插了一些女主的，这还是挺不戳的。我希望作者能坚守自己的道路和写法，尽量不要被一些负面评价影响，慢慢地提升自己，好好写完后面的故事，让人物们好好地走到他们的结局，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761457709,"group_id":"7508781951524817982","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2720655520576745"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7508781951524817982","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"95"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9872,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":65},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7556114728328200985","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，快更！新书有潜力。中二的风格有点像“我打爆学霸兑换科技”那本，都好看。打基础这里挺好看的，期待后期进清北跟宁未未爆人设的情节，可以冲"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759297863,"group_id":"7508781951524817982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我来到，我看见，我记录。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5EqpXzaJGfesh1LeIm2Sx6gwdhyRal6qx0bOd330IDX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/33114219ddb848e6bb468b72d277fef5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788222&x-signature=YUj5S7xX3OLhvHh1ALNzyA4LdLA%3D","user_id":"2720655520576745","user_name":"X轻墨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2720655520576745","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7508781951524817982","book_info":{"abstract":"高三学渣江野怎么也没想到，高考倒计时一百天时，自己竟然被网上相识的清北女神表白了。
